title: AMTRAK TRAIN SERVICES - 211info
text: AMTRAK AMTRAK TRAIN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-distance and international train service to various locations. Discounted fares may be available. Website Washington, DC 20001 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by station (800) 331-0008 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (800) 331-0008 Amtrak Police Toll-free (800) 872-7245 Reservations & Customer Service INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by route Discounted fares include: (exclusions apply, see website for details) -Infants ages 0-2: Free when on an adult's lap -Ages 2-12: 50% discount with the purchase of an adult fare -Students 17-24: 15% discount on qualifying destinations -Senior: 10% discount for age 65 and older -US Armed Forces: 10% discount for active personnel, Veterans, spouses, and dependents DOCUMENTS: For military discount, must provide a valid military picture identification card and ID for family members AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Long Distance Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AMTRAK
